$comment: Canonical description of the .wcode language. Single source of truth for the LSP server (packages/server/src/catalog.ts) and the tree-sitter grammar (tree-sitter-wcode/grammar.js). Verified against wiremod-scheme/src/wcode (lexer, token, types, parser, typeck, ir) and src/constructs.
name: wcode

keywordDocs.module: Optional module name. Must be the first line: `module name`.
keywordDocs.input: A boundary read (a wired-in value). `input x: Number @scanner`. The `@attr` picks the backing construct.
keywordDocs.output: A boundary write; must be driven. `output y: Number @screen = expr`. The `@attr` picks the backing construct.
keywordDocs.let: An immutable binding (inferred or annotated): `let k = a + 1`. Also instantiates devices: `let m = Memory()`.
keywordDocs.var: Parsed but rejected by the checker — `.wcode` has no mutable locals. Use a `Memory` device for persistent state.
keywordDocs.func: A reusable, non-recursive sub-circuit; every call is inlined. `func f(p: Number) -> Number { ... }`.
keywordDocs.return: Return a value from a `func` body.
keywordDocs.if: `if c { a } else { b }` is an expression — sugar for `c ? a : b`. The `else` branch is required when used as a value.
keywordDocs.else: The alternative branch of an `if` expression.
keywordDocs.try: Prefixes a failing assertion that aborts the current test row: `try #require(cond)`.

typeDocs.Bool: A boolean wire value. Coerces to/from Number.
typeDocs.String: A text wire value. Only connects to String or Any.
typeDocs.Any: The dynamic wire type — coerces to and from any other wire type.

inputAttrs.name: scanner
inputAttrs.doc: Backs the input with a **Trigger** (a beam scanner). This is the default when no `@attr` is given.

inputAttrs.name: money
inputAttrs.doc: Backs the input with a **MoneyPot**; the read is its `total_amount`.

outputAttrs.name: screen
outputAttrs.doc: Drives a **Screen**. This is the default when no `@attr` is given.

testAttribute.name: Test
testAttribute.doc: Declares a Swift-Testing-flavored test that runs against the real compiled circuit. Each `arguments` row gets its own fresh build. The following `func`'s parameters receive the row values.

testMacros.name: expect
testMacros.doc: Record a failure if `cond` is false, but keep running the row. `cond` must be exactly `Bool`.

testMacros.name: require
testMacros.doc: Like `#expect`, but aborts the current argument row on failure. Written with the `try` prefix.

dslBuiltins.name: beam
dslBuiltins.doc: Fire a scanner/Trigger beam at `input`: a detection at `distance`, optionally carrying `info` (the value read as `trigger_info`).

dslBuiltins.name: beamClear
dslBuiltins.doc: Clear a standing beam on `input` (no detection this tick).

dslBuiltins.name: deposit
dslBuiltins.doc: Drop a money entity worth `amount` into the MoneyPot `pot`.

dslBuiltins.name: submit
dslBuiltins.doc: Submit `code` to a Keypad `keypad` (defaults to player 1).

dslBuiltins.name: reset
dslBuiltins.doc: Send the reset `code` to a Keypad `keypad` (defaults to player 1).

dslBuiltins.name: force
dslBuiltins.doc: Trigger a Forcer against a prop of `mass` at `distance`.

dslBuiltins.name: damage
dslBuiltins.doc: Apply `amount` damage to a Target (optionally at `offset`).

dslBuiltins.name: tick
dslBuiltins.doc: Advance the wire clock by `n` ticks (default 1). One tick is 0.3 s.

dslBuiltins.name: wait
dslBuiltins.doc: Advance the clock by `seconds`, rounded up to whole ticks.

worldDecls.name: owner
worldDecls.doc: Set the default owner id for emitted constructs.

worldDecls.name: player
worldDecls.doc: Declare a player with optional wallet/position/permissions.

worldDecls.name: dispenser
worldDecls.doc: Declare a gun dispenser a `User` device can target.

constructs.name: Gate
constructs.doc: A logic/arithmetic gate. The operation is chosen by `type:`; inputs feed ports `a`–`e` (and `process`).

params.name: kind
params.doc: The wire type of the constant.

outputs.name: value
outputs.doc: The constant value; its type matches `kind`.

params.name: toggle
params.doc: Toggle (latch) instead of momentary. Default false.

params.name: toggle
params.doc: Toggle instead of momentary. Default false.

constructs.name: User
constructs.doc: Uses (activates) a targeted entity such as a dispenser.

params.name: target
params.doc: A declared dispenser label to activate.

params.name: filter_type
params.doc: What the beam detects. Default Everything.

constructs.name: MoneyPot
constructs.doc: Collects and dispenses money between zones.

params.name: in_zone
params.doc: Zone money drops into on press/drop_all, e.g. "public".

params.name: catches
params.doc: Optional zone to catch money from (vault bridging).

params.name: uniform
params.doc: Uniform force regardless of distance. Default false.

constructs.name: Notifier
constructs.doc: Posts a notification when its input changes.

params.name: include_value
params.doc: Append the value to the message. Default false.

params.name: interval
params.doc: Seconds between pulses (>= one wire tick, <= 3600). Default 1.0.

params.name: hold
params.doc: Seconds to hold the pulse high (0–600). Default 0.

constructs.name: Delay
constructs.doc: Delays its input by a fixed time.

constructs.name: Memory
constructs.doc: Stores a value until cleared (persistent state).

constructs.name: Camera
constructs.doc: A camera source identified by name.

constructs.name: Target
constructs.doc: A damage target that reports hits.

params.name: auto_play
params.doc: Speak automatically when text changes. Default true.
